steps.title: Match the requested advantage
steps.content: The student must quote Fazal to explain an advantage of the geothermal system used at Platanares. Since the notes say Platanares uses a binary cycle system, the relevant advantage is the low environmental impact Fazal connects to returning all geothermal fluid to the injection well.

steps.title: Reject misused quotations
steps.content: Choice A applies Fazal's general geothermal-versus-solar-and-wind quote to a comparison among geothermal systems, which the notes do not support. Choice B gives the wrong cause for low emissions by pointing to high-temperature fluid. Choice D mentions returning fluid but never explains the benefit.

steps.title: Connect mechanism to benefit
steps.content: The remaining choice ties Platanares to binary cycle systems, states that those systems return all geothermal fluid to the injection well, and quotes Fazal's point that this produces "the least environmental impact." The answer is C.
